contact-types.description: Contact type classifications used across all sample contacts

rows.description: Provides information, investigation, and intelligence gathering
Offers ongoing assistance, shelter, or emotional/spiritual support
Connects people, knows who is who, facilitates introductions
Provides illegal or grey-market services directly
Sells or trades physical goods (legal or illegal)
Operates on a favor-for-favor basis rather than standard transactions
